description_long: This is a classic red, cylindrical mailbox mounted on a single wooden post, commonly found in suburban and urban neighborhoods across the United States. The mailbox features a rounded top and a flat bottom, with a front-facing mail slot and a hinged door for mail retrieval. The side of the mailbox displays a raised flag, which can be lifted to signal outgoing mail. Horizontal ridges are present on both sides, adding structural detail and visual interest. The front panel is embossed with the words 'US MAIL', indicating its official use. The mailbox is primarily constructed from metal, with a wooden post for support and an open, hollow interior for mail storage.
description: A red, cylindrical metal mailbox with a front mail slot, raised flag, and mounted on a single wooden post. Embossed 'US MAIL' marking and horizontal side ridges add detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mail slot, embossed 'US MAIL' marking, and the mailbox door.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the raised flag and horizontal ridges on the mailbox body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved back of the mailbox and the supporting wooden post.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flag in the lowered position and the horizontal ridges.
